summary: A silent self-deportation promo that contrasts two outcomes with big bold text overlays: 'IF ICE FINDS YOU' over footage of an agent pinning a man to the ground, versus 'IF YOU SELF-DEPORT' over migrants calmly boarding a deportation charter, ending on a CBP Home app screen offering a $1,000 exit bonus. It is a slogan/text-over-B-roll app promo with no music or genre styling, so it does not fit the music-driven, youth-appeal produced category.
notable_text: IF ICE FINDS YOU; IF YOU SELF-DEPORT; Home - Getting You Home Quickly And Easily; Receive a $1,000 exit bonus; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
